session_2026_04_28.summary: File compression and organization (212 files -> 16), comprehensive JSON export, MMC self-hosting planning

conversation_log.content_myanmar: Preview ဖိုင်တွေက များပြီး အရမ်းရှုပ်ပွနေတယ် ဘာဖိုင်က ဘာမှန်းကျွန်တော် မသိတော့ပါ စုစုပေါင်း426 ဖိုင် ကို ဒေါင်းလော့ပြန်ဆွဲရန် အဆင်မပြေပါ ၎င်းဖိုင်များအား အမျိူအမည်တူရာစုပြီး သင့်တော်မည့် compress လုပ်ပေးပါ Run ရမည့် ဖိုင်များရှိပါက ၎င်းဖိုင်များကို သင်ကပြန်ပြီ chat တွက် script အဖြစ်ချရေးပေးပါ

Removed redundant individual ZIPs and extracted folders

cleanup_actions: Removed 13 extracted folders (now in compressed archives)
Kept 2 active working directories: memory-db/, nyanlin-training-data/

mmc_compiler_architecture.pipeline: MMC Source -> mmc_lexer.mmc -> mmc_parser.mmc -> mmc_codegen.mmc -> Python/C

mmc_lexer.mmc.function: Tokenize MMC source into Token stream
mmc_lexer.mmc.myanmar_keywords: MMCLexer class with Myanmar keyword recognition

mmc_parser.mmc.function: Parse Token stream into AST dict

mmc_codegen.mmc.myanmar_keywords: MMCCodeGenerator class, handles all MMC constructs

mmc_c_codegen.mmc.myanmar_keywords: C code generator for native compilation

ia_bridge.c.function: C bridge for AI method calls

mmc_selfhosting_analysis.current_state: Phase 3.6 Self-Hosting Transition - Bootstrap compiler works
mmc_selfhosting_analysis.how_it_works: compile_mmc.py (Python bootstrap) loads .mmc files via exec() and runs them through Lexer->Parser->CodeGen pipeline
mmc_selfhosting_analysis.bootstrapping_mechanism: load_mmc_module() reads .mmc file, creates Python module, exec() compiles it - .mmc files ARE valid Python syntax with Myanmar keywords

self_hosting_progress.lexer: COMPLETE - mmc_lexer.mmc (631 lines) handles all MMC token types
self_hosting_progress.parser: COMPLETE - mmc_parser.mmc (1492 lines) produces AST dicts
self_hosting_progress.python_codegen: COMPLETE - mmc_codegen.mmc (2050 lines) generates valid Python 3
self_hosting_progress.c_codegen: COMPLETE - mmc_c_codegen.mmc (1436 lines) generates C99 code
self_hosting_progress.ia_bridge: COMPLETE - ia_bridge.c + ia_bridge.h provide C-level AI interface

remaining_work.optimize_python_target: mmc_codegen.mmc output formatting, error messages in Myanmar, performance optimization
remaining_work.c_backend_integration: Complete C runtime library, compile .mmc directly to native binary
remaining_work.nlp_engine: Phase 8 - Myanmar NLP for NYANLIN AI

mmc_selfhosting_analysis.next_step: Optimize mmc_codegen.mmc Python output quality and Myanmar error messages, then begin C backend compilation pipeline

myanmar_language.grammar: MUST be perfect - user will reject poor Myanmar even if code is perfect
myanmar_language.tone: Professional but approachable, polite Myanmar conventions
myanmar_language.cultural: Myanmar culture appropriate vocabulary and expressions
myanmar_language.vocabulary: Natural Myanmar - not word-by-word translated from English

code_quality.production_only: NO roleplay, NO demo, NO simulate, NO Smulete, NO AMOMASTER, NO Erickson
code_quality.myanmar_variables: All MMC variables/functions must use Myanmar language only
code_quality.no_hashtags: No hashtag tags in MMC code files
code_quality.working_code: All code must be functional and production-ready

agent_behavior.proactive: Anticipate needs, don't wait for detailed instructions
agent_behavior.self_directed: Work independently, only ask when truly stuck
agent_behavior.thorough: Complete tasks fully, don't leave partial work
agent_behavior.transparent: Explain what you did and why, in Myanmar
agent_behavior.script_instructions: When providing runnable code, always: (1) say what it does, (2) provide exact command in copy box, (3) explain expected output

nyanlin_ai_design_requirements.ultimate_goal: NYANLIN Binary AI - self-hosting MMC compiler producing a binary AI agent that speaks perfect Myanmar, writes code, uses tools/skills, and powers MyanOS

immediate: Add Myanmar language error messages throughout pipeline
Begin C backend compilation pipeline integration
short_term: Phase 8: NYANLIN AI core NLP engine
long_term: NYANLIN Binary AI - fully self-hosted MMC compiler
Native C compilation of MMC source to binary

key_achievements: MMC Phase 6 complete (1,580 lines of application code)
Download folder organized: 212 files -> 16 files in 7 groups
NYANLIN AI vision established and training data pipeline created
MMC self-hosting architecture analyzed: 7,487 lines of compiler code in MMC
Comprehensive JSON training data log created for future AI training
